card.name: Adept of Discord
card.text: Flying, Painlink (Damage dealt to this creature also causes you to lose that much life.)

card.name: Obnoxious Zombie
card.text: When Obnoxious Zombie becomes the target of a spell an opponent controls, sacrifice it.

card.name: Manticore of Udach
card.text: Flying, Painlink (Damage dealt to this creature also causes you to lose that much life.) When Manticore of Udah dies, draw a card, then discard a card.

card.name: Sneaky Roomie
card.text: Flying When Sneaky Roomie attacks, draw a card, then discard a card.

card.name: Spirit of Wisdom
card.text: Defender {T}: Draw a card, then discard a card.

card.name: Viphiozes' Last Gambit
card.text: Zombie creatures you control get +1/+1. Sacrifice Zombie Apocalypse: Creatures you control cannot be blocked until end of turn.

card.name: Administration of Velatha
card.text: Whenever you sacrifice a land, create a treasure token. At the beginning of you upkeep, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Sorcerer's Apprentice
card.text: Whenever Apprentice Sorcerer enters the battlefield, return target instant or sorcery with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Blessed by Air
card.text: Enchant creature Whenever you cast Blessed by Air, draw a card. Enchanted creature has flying.

card.name: Blessed by Earth
card.text: Enchant creature Whenever you cast Blessed by Earth, you may put a land from your hand onto the battlefield tapped. If you don't, search your library for a basic forest and put it into your hand. Enchanted creature has trample.

card.name: Blessed by Snow
card.text: Enchant creature Whenever you cast Blessed by Snow, tap up to two target creatures. Enchanted creature has vigilance.

card.name: Blessed by Fire
card.text: Enchant creature Whenever you cast Blessed by Fire, you may have it deal 2 damage to target creature. Enchanted creature has first strike.

card.name: Blessed by Disease
card.text: Enchant creature Whenever you cast Blessed by Disease, target player discards a card and looses 1 life. Enchanted creature has lifelink.

card.name: Imploring Menetre
card.text: Put target creature with mana value 4 or more from your graveyard onto the battlefield.

card.name: Enhanced Reflexes
card.text: Target creature gains +1/+2 until end of turn. If that creature dies this turn, it deals damage equal to its power to another target creature.

card.name: Sick Rats
card.text: Deathtouch

card.name: Mind Devourer
card.text: Painlink (Damage dealt to this creature also causes you to lose that much life.) Mind Devourer comes into play tapped unless any player has 10 or less life.

card.name: Affamed Grizzly
card.text: Heritage (When this spell is countered or this creature dies, reveal the top cards of your library until you reveal a card of the same type and lesser mana value. You may cast that card without paying its mana cost. Put all other cards revealed this way on the bottom of your library in a random order.)

card.name: Enchantment of Repulsion
card.text: Creatures lose flying and can't gain flying. Whenever a creature attacks you or a planeswalker you control, return it into its owner's hand at end of combat.

card.name: Refusal
card.text: Counter target creature spell unless its controller pays {2}. Scry 2.

card.name: Ignored the Risk
card.text: Counter target spell. Target player mills 3 cards.

card.name: Lost the Battalion
card.text: Prevent all combat damage that would be dealt by target creature this turn. Its controller mills two cards.

card.name: Sudden Inspiration
card.text: Draw a card. Buyback {3} (You may pay an additional {3} as you cast this spell. If you do, put this card into your hand as it resolves.)

card.name: Erosion Shield
card.text: Whenever you draw a card, each opponent mills a card. Sacrifice Erosion Shield: Gain 5 life.

card.name: Unstable Chimera
card.text: Flying, Heritage (When this spell is countered or this creature dies, reveal the top cards of your library until you reveal a card of the same type and lesser mana value. You may cast that card without paying its mana cost. Put all other cards revealed this way on the bottom of your library in a random order.)

card.name: Defender of Valdor
card.text: Defender Sacrifice Defender of Valdor: Prevent all combat damage that would be dealt this turn.

card.name: Recruitment in Taverns
card.text: Create two 1/1 white soldier tokens. Buyback {3} (You may pay an additional {3} as you cast this spell. If you do, put this card into your hand as it resolves.)

card.name: Serra's Fury
card.text: Starting with you, each player separates permanents they control in two face up piles. Then each player chooses a pile from the opponent on his right. That player sacrifices all permanents in this pile.

card.name: Will of the Master
card.text: Enchant permanent Gain control of enchanted permanent. Heritage (When this spell is countered or this permanent is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, reveal the top cards of your library until you reveal a card of the same type and lesser mana value. You may cast that card without paying its mana cost. Put all other cards revealed this way on the bottom of your library in a random order.)

card.name: Elusive Corpse
card.text: Return another creature you control to its owner's hand: Elusive Corpse can't be blocked until end of turn. Activate this ability as a sorcery and only once each turn.

card.name: Apprentice Illusionist
card.text: When Apprentice Illusionist enters the battlefield, return target creature with mana value 3 or less an opponent controls to its owner's hand.

card.name: Sword of Ganaka
card.text: Equipped creature get +1/+1, has first strike and "Whenever equipped creature deals damage to a player, that player mills that many cards". Equip {3}

card.name: Punch in Your Face!
card.text: Destroy target tapped creature unless its controller pays {2}.

card.name: Purity's Follower
card.text: Heritage (When this spell is countered or this creature dies, reveal the top cards of your library until you reveal a card of the same type and lesser mana value. You may cast that card without paying its mana cost. Put all other cards revealed this way on the bottom of your library in a random order.) When this creature enters, exile target creature until it leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Discord's Spirit
card.text: Flying When Discord's Spirit dies, draw a card.

card.name: Expropriate the Farmers
card.text: {1}{R}, Sacrifice a land: Create two 1/1 red Goblin tokens.

card.name: Order at Stake
card.text: Kicker {1}{R} (You may pay an additional {1}{R} as you cast this spell.) Order at Stake deals 2 damage to any target. If you paid the kicker cost, create a 1/1 white Soldier creature token.

card.name: Lynx of Penaloda
card.text: Trample

card.name: Shadow of Phissi
card.text: Flying, Painlink (Damage dealt to this creature also causes you to lose that much life.)

card.name: No Pain, No Gain
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, pay X life. Each of X target creatures get +2/+2 until end of turn.

card.name: Greed Lost Adept
card.text: Deathtouch, Heritage (When this spell is countered or this creature dies, reveal the top cards of your library until you reveal a card of the same type and lesser mana value. You may cast that card without paying its mana cost. Put all other cards revealed this way on the bottom of your library in a random order.)

card.name: Occult Ritual
card.text: Target player separates the cards in their hand in two face down piles, then you choose one of them. That player discards that pile.

card.name: Ganaka, The First Brother
card.text: Vigilance Each other brother get +1/+1 and gain vigilance. Whenever you control five Brother creatures, you win the game.

card.name: Geneke, The Second Brother
card.text: Flying Each other brother get +1/+1 and gain flying. Whenever you control five Brother creatures, you win the game.

card.name: Gonoko, The Fourth Brother
card.text: Haste Each other brother get +1/+1 and gain haste. Whenever you control five Brother creatures, you win the game.

card.name: Gunuku, The Fifth Brother
card.text: Trample Each other brother get +1/+1 and gain trample. Whenever you control five Brother creatures, you win the game.

card.name: Giniki, The Third Brother
card.text: Lifelink Each other brother get +1/+1 and gain lifelink. Whenever you control five Brother creatures, you win the game.

card.name: Enslaved Reveler
card.text: When Enslaved Reveler enters the battlefield, gain 3 life and target opponent discards a card.

card.name: Sneaky Zombie
card.text: Defender At the beginning of your upkeep, you may exile a creature card from your graveyard. If you exiled a card this way, Sneaky Zombie looses Defender and can't be blocked until end of turn.

card.name: Playing for Death
card.text: Return onto the battlefield all creature cards you own that died this turn under your control.

card.name: Remember From the Stones
card.text: Return up to two target non-land permanents an opponent control into their owner's hand. At the end of turn, that opponent may put a permanent from their hand onto the battlefield.

card.name: Fact or Fiction
card.text: Reveal the top five cards of your library. An opponent separates those cards into two piles. Put one pile into your hand and the other into your graveyard.

card.name: Sleep
card.text: Tap all creatures target player controls. Those creatures don't untap during that player's next untap step.

card.name: Magus of the Grindstone
card.text: Defender {3}, {T}: Target player mills 2 cards. If those cards share at least one color, repeat this process.

card.name: Wall of Addum
card.text: Defender, Lifelink Whenever you gain life, each player mills one card.

card.name: Prayers to Serra
card.text: Gain 1 life for each attacking creature. Buyback {4} (You may pay an additional {4} as you cast this spell. If you do, put this card into your hand as it resolves.)

card.name: Unexpected Reinforcements
card.text: Create a 1/1 white and blue bird creature token with flying. Buyback {3} (You may pay an additional {3} as you cast this spell. If you do, put this card into your hand as it resolves.)

card.name: Introspection
card.text: Draw a card for each creature with defender you control.

card.name: Ihsan, Corrupted Knight
card.text: Menace, Protection from white Whenever Ihsan, Corrupted Knight enters the battlefield, you may destroy target Angel, Knight or Paladin.

card.name: Submarine Guardian
card.text: Defender {2}: Submarine Guardian loses defender until end of turn. When Submarine Guardian attacks, each player mills 2 cards.

card.name: Mechanical Brother
card.text: Whenever this creature or another Brother creature enters, Scry 1. Whenever Mechanical Brother dies, create a 1/1 colorless Construct Brother artifact creature token.

card.name: Gates of Velatha
card.text: Whenever a creature enters the battlefield, Gates of Velatha deals one damage to each opponent.

card.name: Hiring War Refugees
card.text: Create a 1/1 red Goblin token for each land in your graveyard. Buyback {2} (You may pay an additional {2} as you cast this spell. If you do, put this card into your hand as it resolves.)

card.name: Unstoppable Charge
card.text: As an additional cost to play this spell, sacrifice a land. Up to X creatures you control gain +1/+0 and can't be blocked this turn, where X is the number of lands in your graveyard.

card.name: Embrace the Bribe
card.text: Gain control of target creature until end of turn. Untap that creature. It gains haste until end of turn. Heritage (When this spell is countered or this permanent is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, reveal the top cards of your library until you reveal a card of the same type and lesser mana value. You may cast that card without paying its mana cost. Put all other cards revealed this way on the bottom of your library in a random order.)

card.name: Gonoko's Fury
card.text: As an additional cost to play Gonoko's Fury, you may sacrifice a land. Gonoko's Fury deals X damage to any target, where X is one plus the number of lands in your graveyard.

card.name: Growing at All Cost
card.text: As an additional cost to cast Growing at All Cost, discard any number of land cards from your hand. Creatures you control gain +X/+X and trample until end of turn, where X is one plus the number of land cards discarded this way. Damage can't be prevented this turn.

card.name: What's the Point?
card.text: Destroy target creature with power 3 or more.

card.name: Enraged Baloth
card.text: Trample As long as Enraged Baloth is attacking, damage can't be prevented.

card.name: Gangurg, Adept Caster
card.text: {1}{R}{G}, {T}: Lands you control become 3/3 Beast red and green creatures with trample until end of turn.

card.name: Batallion Warleader
card.text: Attacking creatures you control get +1/+0.

card.name: Emissary of Fear
card.text: Painlink, Heritage (Damage dealt to this creature also causes you to lose that much life. When this spell is countered or this creature dies, reveal the top cards of your library until you reveal a card of the same type and lesser mana value. You may cast that card without paying its mana cost. Put all other cards revealed this way on the bottom of your library in a random order.)

card.name: Amazons of Rholt
card.text: Heritage (When this spell is countered or this creature dies, reveal the top cards of your library until you reveal a card of the same type and lesser mana value. You may cast that card without paying its mana cost. Put all other cards revealed this way on the bottom of your library in a random order.)

card.name: Elvish Adventurer
card.text: When this creature enters, search your library for a basic forest and put it into your hand, then shuffle. Heritage (When this spell is countered or this creature dies, reveal the top cards of your library until you reveal a card of the same type and lesser mana value. You may cast that card without paying its mana cost. Put all other cards revealed this way on the bottom of your library in a random order.)

card.name: Haven of Rogues
card.text: Defender Sacrifice a creature: Gain life equal to its toughness.

card.name: Frontal Charge
card.text: Target creature gains +2/+1 and first strike until end of turn.

card.name: Sealing the Fate
card.text: Choose one: - Target creature gains +1/+1 and lifelink until end of turn. - Target creature gains indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Finding the Path to Peace
card.text: Untap all attacking creatures. Prevent all combat damage that would be dealt this turn. You gain life equal to your devotion to white. (Each {W} in the mana costs of permanents you control counts toward your devotion to white.)

card.name: Unleashing the Rage
card.text: Creatures you control gain +1/+1 until end of turn, then Unleashing the Rage deals X damage to target player, where X is your devotion to red. (Each {R} in the mana costs of permanents you control counts toward your devotion to red.)

card.name: Mourning for The Lost
card.text: Target opponent discards a cards, then you may return target creature from your graveyard with mana value equal to your devotion to black to the battlefield. (Each {B} in the mana costs of permanents you control counts toward your devotion to black.)

card.name: Earning Nature's Friendship
card.text: Search your library for a land card and put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. You may put a creature with mana value less or equal to your devotion to green from your hand onto the battlefield (Each {G} in the mana costs of permanents you control counts toward your devotion to green.)

card.name: Gain Height
card.text: Creatures you control gain flying until end of turn. Scry X, where X is your devotion to blue. (Each {U} in the mana costs of permanents you control counts toward your devotion to blue.)

card.name: Succumb to Promises
card.text: Choose a creature. The owner of this creature sacrifices it. You gain life equal to its power.

card.name: Will of Thyrroene
card.text: Choose one - Destroy target artifact or enchantment. - Destroy target creature with flying. - Exile target creature card from a graveyard.

card.name: Spirit of Rholt
card.text: Flying Sacrifice Spirit of Rolth: Return another target creature from your graveyard to the battlefield. Activate only as sorcery.

card.name: Phissi, Vessel of Discord
card.text: This creature can't be blocked. Whenever a creature you control deals combat damage to a player, draw a card.

card.name: Royal Assassin
card.text: {T}: Destroy target tapped creature.

card.name: Wildfire
card.text: Each player sacrifices four lands. Wildfire deals 4 damage to each creature.

card.name: Thyrroene, Mother of All
card.text: Vigilance, Flying, Lifelink, First strike, Trample. {T}, Sacrifice Thyrroene, Mother of All: Search your library for up to four Brother creatures and put them onto the battlefield.

card.name: Recruited Militia
card.text: When Recruited Militia dies, create a 1/1 white Bird creature token with flying.

card.name: Great Orator
card.text: Creature tokens you control get +1/+1.

card.name: Recuiter of the Homeless
card.text: When Recuiter of the Homeless enters the battlefield, create X 1/1 white Soldier creature tokens, where X is the number of lands in your graveyard.

card.name: Ronom Unicorn
card.text: Sacrifice Ronom Unicorn: Destroy target enchantment.

card.name: Valorous Knight
card.text: When Valorous Knight enters the battlefield, create a 1/1 white Dog creature token.

card.name: Serra Child
card.text: Flying When Purity's Child enters the battlefield, gain 1 life for each creature you control.

card.name: Serra Worshipper
card.text: Flying

card.name: Armada Officer
card.text: Flying

card.name: Sky Armada
card.text: Flying Other creatures with flying you control get +1/+1.

card.name: Library's Administrators
card.text: Defender When Library's Administrators enter the battlefield, target player mills 4 cards.

card.name: Velatha's Arena Hero
card.text: Lifelink

card.name: Propulsed Whale
card.text: Flying When Propulsed Whale enters the battlefield, return a creature you control to its owner's hand.

card.name: Ghost Parasite
card.text: When Ghost Parasite dies, draw two cards and lose 2 life.

card.name: Corrupted Missionary
card.text: When Corrupted Missionary enters the battlefield, target creature get -1/-1 until end of turn and its controller looses one life.

card.name: Enraged Macaque
card.text: Enraged Macaque get +X/+X, where X is equal to the number of land cards in your graveyard.

card.name: Invasion Planificator
card.text: Lifelink, protection from white (This creature can't be blocked, targeted, dealt damage, enchanted, or equipped by anything white.)

card.name: Angel of Phissi
card.text: Flying, lifelink

card.name: Battalion Cannon Fodder
card.text: First strike When Battalion Cannon Fodder dies, create a 1/1 red Goblin creature token.

card.name: Veteran of Velatha's War
card.text: Veteran of Velatha's War get +1/+1 as long as you control another creature with power 4 or greater.

card.name: Healer of Broken Lands
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, you may put target land from your graveyard on top of your library.

card.name: Mad War Fugitive
card.text: First strike

card.name: Guardian of Velioth
card.text: Haste, trample

card.name: Good-Natured Merchant
card.text: {T}, Discard a card: Draw a card.

card.name: Keeper of Order
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, you may sacrifice a land. If a land is put into a graveyard this way, creatures that enter the battlefield under your control this turn come with a +1/+1 counter on it and have haste until end of turn.

card.name: Geirdyn Herald
card.text: At the beginning of its controller's upkeep, this creature deals one damage to its controller.

card.name: Adept of Growth
card.text: Haste, Heritage (When this spell is countered or this creature dies, reveal the top cards of your library until you reveal a card of the same type and lesser mana value. You may cast that card without paying its mana cost. Put all other cards revealed this way on the bottom of your library in a random order.)

card.name: Goblin Landlord
card.text: Whenever you sacrifice a land, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature and create two treasure tokens.

card.name: Geirdyn Mercenary
card.text: Kicker {1}{R} (You may pay an additional {1}{R} as you cast this spell.) Flying When Geirdyn Skyrider enters the battlefield, if you paid the kicker cost, create two 1/1 red Goblin creature tokens.

card.name: Wurm of Arid Steppes
card.text: Trample

card.name: Shaman of Rholt
card.text: {T}, sacrifice Shaman of Rholt: Destroy target enchantment.

card.name: Apprentice Herbalist
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color other than lands you control could produce.

card.name: Passage Protector
card.text: Reach, Heritage (When this spell is countered or this creature dies, reveal the top cards of your library until you reveal a card of the same type and lesser mana value. You may cast that card without paying its mana cost. Put all other cards revealed this way on the bottom of your library in a random order.)

card.name: Wurm of Penaloda
card.text: Trample When Wurm of Penaloda enters the battlefield, gain 8 life.

card.name: Mushrooms Harvester
card.text: At the beginning of each end step, gain 1 life.

card.name: Bumbeldop Family
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, put a +1/+1 counter on Bumbeldop Family. When Bumbeldop Family dies, create a 1/1 green Ooze token for each +1/+1 counter on it. Burp!

card.name: Spear of Geneke
card.text: Equipped creature get +1/+1, has flying and "When this creature deals combat damage to a player, scry 2". Equip {2}

card.name: Knife of Giniki
card.text: Equipped creature get +1/+1, has deathtouch and "When this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may sacrifice it. If you do, return to the battlefield another creature with power equal or less than the creature sacrificed this way." Equip {4}

card.name: Mace of Gonoko
Staff of Gunuku
card.text: Equipped creature get +1/+1, has trample and "Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, create a 1/1 green Butterfly creature token". Equip {2}

card.name: Hisseyia, Avatar of Purity
card.text: Flying, Vigilance At the beginning of your end step, gain X life and target opponent mills X cards, where X is the number of creatures you control.

card.name: Nogafris, Avatar of Order
card.text: Haste Nogafris, Avatar of Order cost {1} less to cast for each land card in your graveyard. At the beginning of your upkeep, sacrifice a land, then create a 1/1 white Soldier creature token with Haste for each land card in your graveyard.

card.name: Viphiozes, Avatar of Discord
card.text: Viphiozes, Avatar of Discord can't be blocked. At the beginning of your end step, you may put a +1/+1 counter on this creature if you lost life this turn.When you do, gain control of target creature with power equal or less than this creature until you lose control of Viphiozes, Avatar of Discord.

card.name: Menetre, Avatar of Greed
card.text: Deathtouch {T}, pay 3 life, return another creature you control to its owner's hand: Put a creature from your graveyard onto the battlefield. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Velioth, Avatar of Growth
card.text: Trample Other creatures you control get +1/+1 and have trample. Whenever a creature you control leaves the battlefield, put a 2/2 green Fungus creature token.

card.name: Living the Nightmare
card.text: Target creature get -3/-3 until end of turn.

card.name: Village Rites
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature. Draw two cards.

card.name: One for the Team
card.text: Target creature you control get +3/+3 until end of turn. All creatures able to block it this turn do so.

card.name: Growth Over Life
card.text: Kicker— Return any number of creatures you control to their owner's hands. Search your library for two basic land cards and put them into your hand, then shuffle. If you paid the Kicker cost, you may put X lands from your hand onto the battlefield tapped, where X is one plus the number of creatures you returned to your hand this turn.

card.name: Scorched-earth Strategy
card.text: Each opponent that has more lands than you sacrifices the difference.

card.name: Disband the Weaks
card.text: Creatures get -1/-1 until end of turn. Draw a card and lose 1 life.

card.name: Bloodprice Engine
card.text: {2}, {T}, sacrifice a creature: Draw a card.

card.name: Taken by Surprise
card.text: Kicker {G} (You may pay an additional {G} as you cast this spell.) Up to two target creatures each gain +2/+0. If you paid the kicker cost, they also gain trample until end of turn.

card.name: Peaceful Retreat
card.text: Draw three cards, then you may put a land onto the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Herald of Growth
card.text: When Herald of Growth enters the battlefield, draw a card. Sacrifice Herald of Growth: Put a +1/+1 counter on each beast you control.

card.name: Take a Revenge
card.text: Take a Revenge deals 3 damage to each creature and each player. If one or more non-token creature would die this way under your control, create that many 1/1 red Goblin creature token.

card.name: Terramorphic Expanse
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice Terramorphic Expanse: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Cathedral of Valdor
card.text: When Cathedral of Valdor enters the battlefield, Scry 1. {T}: Add {W} or {U}. Cathedral of Valdor deals 1 damage to you.

card.name: Fortress of Geirdyn
card.text: When Fortress of Geirdyn enters the battlefield, Scry 1. {T}: Add {R} or {W}. Fortress of Geirdyn deals 1 damage to you.

card.name: Grotto of Penaloda
card.text: When Grotto of Penaloda enters the battlefield, Scry 1. {T}: Add {R} or {G}. Grotto of Penaloda deals 1 damage to you.

card.name: Palace of Rholt
card.text: When Palace of Rholt enters the battlefield, Scry 1. {T}: Add {B} or {G}. Palace of Rholt deals 1 damage to you.

card.name: Mausoleum of Udach
card.text: When Mausoleum of Udach enters the battlefield, Scry 1. {T}: Add {U} or {B}. Mausoleum of Udach deals 1 damage to you.

card.name: Peace Offering
card.text: {2}: Target creature neither deals nor receives combat damage this turn. Any player may activate this ability.

card.name: Eleiia, Leader of Fugitives
card.text: Create a 1/1 red Goblin creature token. Sacrifice a land: Eleiia, Leader of Fugitives deals X damage to any target, where X is two plus the number of lands you sacrificed this turn. Create X white and red Angel 4/4 tokens with Flying, where X is the number of lands in your graveyard.

card.name: Priest of Purity
card.text: {W}, {T}: Gain 2 life. {U}, {T}: Target player mills three cards.

card.name: Priest of Discord
card.text: {U}, {T}: Target creature with power 3 or less can't be blocked this turn. {B}, {T}: Target creature gain painlink until end of turn. (Damage dealt to this creature also causes you to lose that much life.)

card.name: Priest of Growth
card.text: {R}, {T}: Priest of Growth deals one damage to target creature. Damage can't be prevented this turn. {G}, {T}: Search your library for a basic forest, shuffle then put it on top of your library.

card.name: Priest of Greed
card.text: {B}, {T}, Sacrifice two other creatures: Put target creature from your graveyard into your hand. {G}, {T}: Surveil 1, then gain one life for each creature card in your graveyard. (To surveil 1, look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Priest of Order
card.text: {R}, {T}, Sacrifice a land: Create two white 1/1 Soldier creature token. {W}, {T}: Creatures you control get +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Geirdyn Overlords
card.text: Flying, Double strike You may sacrifice any number of lands when you cast this spell. This spell costs {2} less to cast for each land sacrificed this way.

card.name: Ascension to Enlightment
card.text: You have hexproof until end of turn. Prevent all damage that would be dealt to you or creatures you control this turn.

card.name: Assashain, Homeless Outsider
card.text: Vigilance Other creatures you control get +1/+1. When Assashain, Homeless Outsider enters the battlefield, create a 3/3 green Beast creature token with trample.

card.name: Musical Interlude
card.text: Exile all creatures, then return them onto the battlefield under their owner's control.

card.name: Young Widow
card.text: Lands you control have "{T}: Add one mana of any color".

card.name: Praying the Dawn
card.text: Skip your draw step. Pay 1 life: Exile the top card of your library. At the beginning of your next end step, put that card into your hand. Any player may activate this ability.

card.name: Reconstructing Landscape
card.text: Choose one: - Return all land cards from your graveyard onto the battlefield tapped. - You may play any number of lands this turn.

card.name: Velioth Experimentation
card.text: Flying

card.name: Meet Your Creator
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature. Search your library for a creature card with mana value less or equal to two plus the mana value of the sacrificed creature, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle. If a creature entered this way, creatures you control have same base power and toughness as that creature until end of turn.

card.name: Bring to Justice
card.text: When Bring to Justice enters the battlefield, exile target creature or planeswalker and all permanents with the same name until Bring to Justice leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Champion of Geirdyn
card.text: First strike When Champion of Geirdyn attacks, tap up to two target creatures an opponent controls.

card.name: Moment of Inspiration
card.text: Choose two: - Destroy all enchantments - Gain 1 life for each creature you control - Creatures you control gain +1/+1 and trample until end of turn

card.name: Escape Reality
card.text: Choose one: - Return all creatures to their owner's hand - Draw four cards

card.name: Hilena, Voice of the Legions
card.text: Flying, Vigilance When this creature attacks, put a +1/+1 counter on up to two other target creatures you control.

card.name: Oath of the Saints
card.text: Kicker {1}{U}, Buyback {1}{G}{G} Prevent all combat damage target creature would deal this turn. If you paid the kicker cost, target player mills as many cards as the toughness of that creature.

card.name: Oath of the Whisperers
card.text: Kicker {1}{B}, Buyback {1}{G}{G} Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand. If you paid the kicker cost, target opponent discards a card.

card.name: Oath of the Damned
card.text: Kicker {1}{U}, Buyback {1}{R}{R} Target player sacrifices a creature. If you paid the kicker cost, whenever a creature you control deals combat damage to a player this turn, draw a card.

card.name: Oath of the Beloved
card.text: Kicker {1}{R}, Buyback {1}{U}{U} Target creature get +3/+3 until end of turn. If you paid the kicker cost, Oath of the Beloved deals 2 damage to any target.

card.name: Oath of the Veterans
card.text: Kicker {1}{W}, Buyback {1}{B}{B} Create a 1/1 red Goblin creature token with haste. If you paid the kicker cost, creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Oath of the Conquerors
card.text: Kicker {1}{R}, Buyback {1}{U}{U} Put a +1/+1 counter on up to two target creatures. If you paid the kicker cost, destroy target artifact.

card.name: Oath of the Believers
card.text: Kicker {1}{W}, Buyback {1}{B}{B} Scry 2, then draw a card. If you paid the kicker cost, destroy target enchantment.

card.name: Oath of the Forsakens
card.text: Kicker {1}{G}, Buyback {1}{R}{R} Sacrifice a creature. If you sacrifice a creature this way, draw two cards. If you paid the kicker cost, return target creature from your graveyard to your hand and gain 2 life.

card.name: Oath of the Lonely
card.text: Kicker {1}{B}, Buyback {1}{W}{W} Put two +1/+1 counters on up to one target noncreature land you control. Untap it. It becomes a 0/0 Elemental creature with trample that is still a land. If you paid the kicker cost, double the number of counters on target permanent.

card.name: Oath of the Vengeful
card.text: Kicker {1}{G}, Buyback {1}{W}{W} Damage can't be prevented this turn. Whenever a creature blocks this turn, it deals one damage to its controller. If you paid the kicker cost, Oath of the Vengeful deals 2 damages to all creatures.

card.name: Gedric, Champion of Order
card.text: Protection from Beasts Creatures you control have haste. Whenever a land is put into your graveyard from the battlefield, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.

card.name: Srod, Offspring of Growth
card.text: Hexproof, Trample Srod, Offspring of Growth can't be blocked by more than two creatures.

card.name: Menelas, Voice of Greed
card.text: Deathtouch {T}, Sacrifice a non-token creature you control: Reveal the top cards of your library until you reveal a creature card. Put that creature onto the battlefield and all other cards revealed this way on the bottom of your library in a random order. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Thessene, Symbol of Purity
card.text: Defender Other creatures have base power 1.

card.name: Relic of Past Glory
card.text: When Relic of Past Glory enters the battlefield, scry 1. {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Oblivion Ring
card.text: When Oblivion Ring enters the battlefield, exile another target nonland permanent. When Oblivion Ring leaves the battlefield, return the exiled card to the battlefield under its owner's control.

card.name: Obedient Vanguard
card.text: Kicker {1}{W}{W} (You may pay an additional {1}{W}{W} as you cast this spell.) If you paid the kicker cost, Obedient Vanguard enters with a +1/+1 counter on it. Whenever Obedient Vanguard enters or attacks, if it has a +1/+1 counter on it, create a 1/1 white Soldier creature token.

card.name: Rumbling Monster
card.text: Trample Whenever Rumbling Monster deals damage to an opponent, look at the top four cards of your library. You may reveal a creature card from among them and put it into your hand.

card.name: Uxizas, Lightning Oracle
card.text: {3}{U}{U}: Reveal the top three cards of your library. An opponent chooses one of them. Put the chosen card into your graveyard and the rest into your hand. Activate only as sorcery.

card.name: Tradewind Expert
card.text: Tap three untapped creatures you control: Return target creature to its owner's hand.

card.name: Wildbane Elemental
card.text: Kicker— Sacrifice a land (You may Sacrifice a land in addition to any other costs as you cast this spell.) Haste Wildbane Elemental enters the battlefield with X +1/+1 counter on it, where X is the number of land cards in your graveyard.

card.name: Wicked Aberration
card.text: {2}{G}{G}: Create a 3/3 green Beast creature token.

card.name: Pause in Time
card.text: Take an extra turn after this one, then target opponent takes an extra turn after his next turn.

card.name: Harvest the Moon's Promesses
card.text: Each player discards their hand, then draws seven cards.

card.name: Permanent Equilibrium
card.text: At the beginning of each player's upkeep, that player looks at the top three cards of their library then put them back in any order. They may then reveal the top card of their library: If that card is a land or a creature card and they control less permanents of that type than any of their opponents, they put it onto the battlefield.

card.name: Wild Experimentation
card.text: When Wild Experimentation enters the battlefield, sacrifice a creature. Creatures you control that share a type with the sacrificed creature get +2/+2, have haste and must attack each turn if able. At the beginning of your combat phase, create a 1/1 red Shapeshifter creature token with changeling.

card.name: Jace, Unfortunate Traveler
card.text: Target creature can't be blocked this turn. Return target creature to its owner's hand. That player discards a card. Gain control of each creature with power equal or less than the number of islands you control, then destroy creatures you don't control.

card.name: Igdiul, Phyrexian Scourge
card.text: Draw a card. You lose 2 life. Destroy target creature or planeswalker. Return up to X target creatures from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Smint
card.text: Trample Whenever you sacrifice a permanent, put a +1/+1 counter on Smint and it gains menace until end of turn.

card.name: Guided Purification
card.text: Exile target non-land permanent, then Scry 1.

card.name: Radiant Resolve
card.text: Target creature gains +2/+1 and lifelink until end of turn.

card.name: Zephyr Net
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature has defender and flying.

card.name: Neuralgia
card.text: Choose one: - Destroy target creature with Defender. - Target player discards two cards and looses 2 life.

card.name: Charge and Claim
card.text: Choose one - Creatures you control gain +2/+0 until end of turn. - Create two Treasure tokens.

card.name: Psychic Touch
card.text: Target creature gains Deathtouch until end of turn It fights another creature you don't control.

card.name: True Betrayal
card.text: Return target creature to its owner's hand, then that player discards a card.

card.name: Steep Hill
card.text: Steep Hill enters tapped. {T}: Add {R}. {T}, Sacrifice Steep Hill: Target creature gains +1/+0 and haste until end of turn.

card.name: Untouched Mangrove
card.text: Untouched Mangrove enters tapped. {T}: Add {G}. {T}, Sacrifice Untouched Mangrove: Create a Treasure token.

card.name: Secret Grasslands
card.text: Secret Grasslands enters tapped. {T}: Add {W}. {T}, Sacrifice Secret Grasslands: Create a 0/2 white Goat creature token.

card.name: Hidden Pool
card.text: Hidden Pool enters tapped. {T}: Add {U}. {T}, Sacrifice Hidden Pool: Surveil 2.

card.name: Muddy Trail
card.text: Muddy Trail enters tapped. {T}: Add {B}. {T}, Sacrifice Muddy Trail: Target creature gains +1/+0 and menace until end of turn.

card.name: Altar of Renewed Knowledge
card.text: {5}, {T}, Sacrifice Altar of Renewed Knowledge : Destroy target permanent. Shuffle up to four cards from your graveyard to your library.

card.name: Orderbound Apprentice
card.text: {1}{W}, {T}: Tap target non-human creature.

card.name: Herald of the Armada
card.text: Flying, Protection from Black Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature you control gain flying until end of turn.

card.name: Feedback Elemental
card.text: Painlink (Damage dealt to this creature also causes you to lose that much life.)

card.name: Armada Scout
card.text: Flying Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, draw a card, then discard a card.

card.name: Chronicle Relic
card.text: When Chronicle Relic enters, scry 3. {T}, sacrifice Chronicle Relic: Shuffle your graveyard into your library. Draw a card. Activate this ability as a sorcery.

card.name: Carrion Climber
card.text: Menace At the beginning of each end step, if a creature you controlled died this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Whispering Shadow
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, draw a card and loose 1 life.

card.name: Pathbreaker Elemental
card.text: When this creature enters, target creature can't block until end turn.

card.name: Frenzy Piker
card.text: Haste When this creature enters, target creature gains first strike until end of turn.

card.name: Loamkeeper Sapling
card.text: Defender When this creature enters, mill four cards. You may put a land card from among the cards milled this way into your hand.

card.name: Wildgrove Channeler
card.text: Whenever a land enters under your control, put a +1/+1 counter on target Beast creature you control.

card.name: Grovebirth Elemental
card.text: When this creature enters, create a 2/2 green Beast creature token.

card.name: Harrow
card.text: As an additional cost to cast Harrow, sacrifice a land. Search your library for up to two basic land cards and put them onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Fecund Renewal
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, if a creature died this turn under your control, draw a card.

card.name: Wildgrowth Den
card.text: Enchant land Enchanted land has "{1}{G}, {T}: Create a 3/3 green Beast creature token."

card.name: Cycles of Renewal
card.text: Mill four cards, then gain 2 life for each creature card in your graveyard.

card.name: Valiant Banneret
card.text: When this creature enters, creatures you control gain +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Inferno Surge
card.text: Inferno Surge deals X damage to any target. If a creature would die this way, exile it instead.

card.name: Cleansing Rite
card.text: Kicker {W} (You may pay an additional {W} as you cast this spell.) Destroy target artifact or enchantment. If you paid the kicker cost, gain life equal to its mana value.

card.name: Aerial Bulwark
card.text: Defender, Flying Other creatures you control with defender gain +0/+1.

card.name: Divine Uplift
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gains +2/+2 and flying. Draw a card.

card.name: Siegebreaker Engine
card.text: Defender {T}: Destroy target creature with defender. Put a stun counter on this creature.

card.name: Thought Reservoir
card.text: Whenever a non-token creature enters under your control, put a sapience counter on Thought Reservoir. Remove four sapience counters from Thought Reservoir: Draw three cards.

card.name: Aether Reversal
card.text: Kicker {1}{U} (You may pay an additional {1}{U} as you cast this spell.) Return up to two creatures to their owner's hands. If you paid the kicker cost, draw a card.

card.name: Gale Ambusher
card.text: Flash, Flying

card.name: Augury Wisp
card.text: When this creature enters, scry 2.

card.name: Disturbed Burial
card.text: Buyback {3} (You may pay an additional {3} as you cast this spell. If you do, put this card into your hand as it resolves.) Return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Bloodtithe Apprentice
card.text: Sacrifice a creature: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Culling the Weak
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature. Add {B}{B}{B}{B}.

card.name: Gravedigger Apprentice
card.text: When this creature enters, return target creature with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Wasteland Plunder
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature has menace. Whenever enchanted creature attacks, if you have one or more lands in your graveyard, create a treasure token.

card.name: Ruinbound Minotaur
card.text: When this creature enters, sacrifice it unless you sacrificed a land this turn.

card.name: Landscorch Ogre
card.text: When this creature enters, you may sacrifice a land. If you do, it deals damage equal to its power to target opponent.

card.name: Landlord's Chest
card.text: Whenever Landlord's Chest enters or you sacrifice a land, create a treasure Token. {T}, sacrifice Landlord's Chest: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Father of Demise
card.text: {T}: Target spell or permanent you control gains heritage until end of turn.

card.name: Angel of the Big Titties
card.text: Flying, Vigilance Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may search your library for a plains card and put it into you hand then shuffle.

card.name: Kewok, Land-Eater Ketone
card.text: Whenever a land enters under your control, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. Whenever a land is put into your graveyard from anywhere, this creature gains trample and is indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Incremental Revelation
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, put a charge counter on Incremental Revelation, then you may discard an instant or sorcery card from your hand. If you do, search your library for an instant or sorcery card with mana value less than or equal to the number of charge counters on Incremental Revelation.

card.name: Devotee of Viphiozes
card.text: Flying, trample When this creature enters, destroy target creature or planeswalker. At the beginning of your upkeep, loose 2 life.

card.name: Archon of the Unbroken Charge
card.text: Flying, Protection from black Whenever this creature attacks, untap all other creatures you control.

card.name: Animate Dead
card.text: Enchant creature card in a graveyard When this Aura enters, if it's on the battlefield, it loses "enchant creature card in a graveyard" and gains "enchant creature put onto the battlefield with this Aura." Return enchanted creature card to the battlefield under your control and attach this Aura to it. When this Aura leaves the battlefield, that creature's controller sacrifices it. Enchanted creature gets -1/-0.

card.name: Ragepack Inciter
card.text: Menace Other Beast creatures you control get +1/+0 and have menace.

card.name: Sphinx of Endless Insight
card.text: Flying Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, draw a card.
